<Definition auto='false'>

	<Script Name="AfterShow" When="AfterShow">
		
		var control = this;

		// PERF: registra os observers UMA vez para todas as instancias + debounce das rajadas.
		if (window.gx && gx.fx && gx.fx.obs && !window.__ucTooltipObsBound) {
			window.__ucTooltipObsBound = true;
			var scheduled = false;
			var run = function () { scheduled = false; control.Tooltip(); };
			var schedule = function () {
				if (scheduled) return;
				scheduled = true;
				if (window.requestAnimationFrame) { requestAnimationFrame(run); } else { setTimeout(run, 0); }
			};
			gx.fx.obs.addObserver("gx.onload",          this, function() {
				// Fechamento do tooltip ao trocar de página
				if (window.tippy && tippy.hideAll) {
					tippy.hideAll();
				}
				// Precisa resetar a variável para reaplicar o tooltip ao voltar de página
				window.__ucTooltipObsBound = false; 
			});
			gx.fx.obs.addObserver("grid.onafterrender", this, schedule);
			schedule();
		}
	</Script>
	
	<Script Name="Tooltip">
		// PERF: querySelectorAll no lugar de jQuery :hidden/:visible (que forcam reflow por
		// elemento). Cada no tratado perde o title, entao e ignorado nas passadas seguintes.
		// O content e capturado ANTES de remover o title (o codigo antigo lia depois -> vazio).
		var titled = document.querySelectorAll("[title]");
		for (var i = 0; i < titled.length; i++) {
			var el = titled[i];
			if (el.tagName === "IFRAME") { el.removeAttribute("title"); continue; }
			if (typeof el.id === "undefined" || el.id === "") continue;

			var title = el.getAttribute("title");
			if (title && title !== "") {
				if (el._tippy) {
					el._tippy.setProps({ content: title });
				} else {
					var title = el.getAttribute("title");

					tippy(el, {
						theme: "material",
						arrow: false,
						allowHTML: true,
						delay: [500, null],
						trigger: "mouseenter",
						interactive: true,
						hideOnClick: false,
						content: title,
						appendTo: document.body
					});
				}
				el.removeAttribute("title");
			}
		}
	</Script>
	


	<Script Name="Show" Parameters="InternalName, ParmsJson">
		setTimeout(() => {
			const element = document.querySelector('#'+ InternalName)			
			const instance = element._tippy
			
			const parms = JSON.parse(ParmsJson)
			const parameters = {
				 content: parms.Content,
				   theme: 'material',
				maxWidth: parms.MaxWidth == 0 ? 'auto' : parms.MaxWidth,
			   allowHTML: true, 
			   placement: parms.Placement,
			 interactive: true,
				duration: [1000, 100], 						
				 trigger: `manual ${parms.Trigger}`,
			}
		
			if (instance == null) {
				const instance = tippy(element, parameters)
				instance.show()
			} else {
				instance.setProps(parameters)
				instance.show()
			}
		})
	</Script>
	
	<Script Name="Hide" Parameters="InternalName">
		setTimeout(() => {
			const element = document.querySelector('#'+ InternalName)
			const instance = element._tippy;
			
			if (instance != null) 
				instance.destroy()
		})
	</Script>
	
</Definition>
